text:
Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 OUD_HOSP_COMBINED_EVER Opioid-Related Hospitalization or ED First Ever Occurrence Date - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_HOSP_MEDICAID_EVER Opioid-Related Hospitalization or ED First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicaid Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_HOSP_MEDICARE_EVER Opioid-Related Hospitalization or ED First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicare Only Claims date
